# Trending Store

> Trending Store (trending-store.com) is an online shop based in Tripoli,
> Lebanon, selling smart gadgets and practical everyday products (tools, home,
> garden, electronics, pest control). Delivery across Lebanon with Cash on
> Delivery. The storefront is bilingual (Arabic first / English), with full RTL
> support.

## Storefront

- [Homepage](https://trending-store.com/): hero offers, featured categories, trending products
- [Shop all products](https://trending-store.com/shop): full catalog with category filters and search
- [Search](https://trending-store.com/search): product search
- [About](https://trending-store.com/about): store info
- [FAQ](https://trending-store.com/faq): delivery, payment and returns answers
- [Delivery info](https://trending-store.com/delivery): coverage and timing
- [Contact](https://trending-store.com/contact): WhatsApp, phone and email

## Product data

- [Meta catalog feed (CSV)](https://trending-store.com/meta-feed.csv): full product feed — id (SKU), title, description, price USD, availability, image link, product page link
- [Sitemap](https://trending-store.com/sitemap.xml): all indexable pages and active products
- Product pages live at `https://trending-store.com/product/{id}` and carry OpenGraph product tags plus JSON-LD Product schema (price, availability).

## Policies

- Payment: Cash on Delivery across Lebanon; no card required.
- Delivery: nationwide Lebanon.
- Support: WhatsApp +961 81 751 841 and support@trending-stores.com.
- Legal pages: [Privacy](https://trending-store.com/privacy), [Terms](https://trending-store.com/terms), [Shipping](https://trending-store.com/shipping), [Returns](https://trending-store.com/returns).

## Notes for agents

- Prices are in USD; Cash on Delivery is settled at delivery.
- Images are served from the images.trending-store.com CDN (Cloudflare R2) as sharp-generated WebP variants (thumb/card/large).
- The storefront is Arabic-first (RTL) with a full English toggle; most content has Arabic and English variants (fields suffixed `_ar`).
